name: DERMOID / EPIDERMOID OF HEAD AND NECK
definition: benign congenital or acquired (eg, posttraumatic) inclusions of dermal elements at site of dermal inclusion in cranium through patent suture

demographics.Histo: inclusion cyst lined by squamous / respiratory epithelium containing derivatives
demographics.Path: cheesy tumor, fat content often collects in globules
demographics.Location: anywhere between glabella (= depressed space between eyebrows above nose)

distribution: anywhere between glabella (= depressed space between eyebrows above nose)
discriminating_features: ± CHARACTERISTIC restriction at DWI (= high diffusion + moderately low apparent
variable nonspecific appearance of sinus ± cyst
greater signal heterogeneity ← combination of solid and cystic elements

general: greater signal heterogeneity ← combination of solid and cystic elements
± CHARACTERISTIC restriction at DWI (= high diffusion + moderately low apparent
well-circumscribed lesions of high T2 signal
bone defect in cranium (= dermal sinus)
MR: variable nonspecific appearance of sinus ± cyst
hypointense / hyperintense (sebaceous fluid) / isointense relative to muscle on T1WI

clinical.Cx: infection with abscess in nasal septum
clinical.Prognosis: malignant degeneration into squamous cell carcinoma in 5%
